title: AppointmentTemplate
description: Appointment templates are blocks of time during which a doctor usually sees appointments with the same profile. These may have a longer duration then the corresponding profile, in which case they may allow multiple appointments to be booked during that period.

profile.description: ID of the appointment profile to default to
profile.title: Profile

archived.description: Indicats that the object has been soft-deleted and should not be used
archived.title: Archived

week_days.description: Array of integers that indicate week days (`0` = Monday, ..., `6` = Sunday)
week_days.title: Week days

open_slots.description: Array of time intervals during which the template is available. Only computed if the available and verbose query parameters are passed. Note that only slots long enough to fit an appointment with the corresponding profile are included.
open_slots.title: Open Slots

duration.description: Length of an appointment in minutes
duration.title: Duration
